card.name: Venomari Seer
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. {U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: The Overlord
card.text: Flying Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain that much life.

card.name: Shard, Guardian of the Rime
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) Flying, first strike

card.name: Vindicate
card.text: Destroy target permanent.

card.name: Lloyd, Ultimate Spinjitzu Master
card.text: Vigilance, flying, ward {2} {t}: Add {w}{u}{b}{r}{g}. Spend this mana only to activate an ability. (Spinjutsu is an ability, activated from either your hand or the battlefield.)

card.name: Morro, Promised Greatness
card.text: Spinjutsu {3}{g}{b} ({3}{g}{b}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) Flying You can activate Morro's Spinjutsu ability from your graveyard as though he was in your hand.

card.name: Rocky, Guardian of the Crags
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) Flying, trample

card.name: Putrefy
card.text: Destroy target artifact or creature. It can't be regenerated.

card.name: Zane, the White Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {1}{w} ({1}{w}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) When Zane enters, create a 2/1 white Bird artifact creature token with flying. (Only if he enters this side up.)

card.name: Tornado of Creation
card.text: Convoke with Ninjas (Your Ninjas can help cast this spell. Each Ninja creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Draw seven cards. Until end of turn, you may cast spells from your hand and activate abilities of cards in your hand without paying their mana costs. Exile ~.

card.name: Spyglass Siren
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: The Nunchucks of Lightning
Kai, the Red Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {2}{r} ({2}{r}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) Haste

card.name: The Great Devourer
card.text: Trample Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield during your turn, you may put X +1/+1 counters on ~, where X was that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Tormented Soul
card.text: This creature can't block and can't be blocked.

card.name: Lord Garmadon, Dark King
card.text: Menace, double strike At the beginning of your end step, incubate X, where X is the number of creatures that dealt combat damage to a player this turn. (Create an Incubator token with X +1/+1 counters on it and "{2}: Transform this token." It transforms into a 0/0 Phyrexian artifact creature.) Partner—Sons of the First

card.name: Morro, Master of Wind
card.text: Flying Whenever Morro deals combat damage to a player, destroy target nonland permanent that player controls.

card.name: Cole, the Black Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {2}{b} ({2}{b}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) Menace

card.name: Samurai X
card.text: When Samurai X enters, choose one. Repeat this process X times — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Samurai X. • Samurai X deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Birds of Paradise
card.text: Flying {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Jay, Master of Lightning
card.text: Flying Whenever Jay deals combat damage to a player, tap or untap target permanent. {1}{u}{u}: Counter up to one target spell or ability. Scry 1. Return Jay to its owner's hand.

card.name: Mist-Cloaked Herald
card.text: This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Fell
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: Triton Shorestalker
card.text: This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Zane, Master of Ice
card.text: Whenever Zane deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {1}{w}: Put a stun counter on target permanent. At the beginning of the next upkeep, return Zane to its owner's hand.

card.name: Grand Sensei Dereth, the Brown Ninja
card.text: When Grand Sensei Dereth leaves the battlefield, draw a card and create a tapped treasure token.

card.name: Fangpyre Infector
card.text: When this creature enters, put a -1/-1 counter on target permanent. As long as that permanent has a -1/-1 counter on it, it has first strike and is a Snake in addition to its other types. {U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Kaseto, Orochi Archmage (Scales, Hypnobrai Waymaker)
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Nya, Novice Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {2}{u}{u} When Nya enters, you may search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. (Do so only if she enters this face up.)

card.name: Pythor P. Chumsworth, Confidant
card.text: Skulk Whenever Pythor deals combat damage to a player, he connives. (Draw a card. Discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) If Pythor would leave the battlefield, you may instead pay {1}{r}{u}. If you do, regenerate him and transform him.

card.name: Kodama's Reach
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Amazing Spider-Man
card.text: Vigilance, reach Each legendary spell you cast that's one or more colors has web-slinging {G}{W}{U}. (You may cast a spell for its web-slinging cost if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.)

card.name: Lloyd, Master of Energy
card.text: Trample Whenever Lloyd deals combat damage to a player, he deals that much damage to target creature they control. {t}, Return Lloyd to its owner's hand: Add {g}{g}{g}{g}.

card.name: Mist-Syndicate Naga
card.text: Ninjutsu {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: The Sword of Fire
Wisp, Guardian of the Tempest
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) Flying, vigilance

card.name: High Priest of Penance
card.text: Whenever this creature is dealt damage, you may destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Skydive Ride
card.text: Flying Whenever this Vehicle attacks and isn't blocked, target creature that crewed it this turn is attacking the same player. (It becomes an unblocked attacker.) Crew 1

card.name: Kai, Master of Flame
card.text: Whenever Kai deals combat damage to a player, add that much {r}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. {1}{r}: Kai deals 2 damage to any target. At the beginning of the next upkeep, return Kai to its owner's hand.

card.name: Jay, the Blue Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {2}{u} ({2}{u}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) Skulk

card.name: The Scythe of Quakes
Doom Blade
card.text: Destroy target nonblack creature.

card.name: Peter Parker
card.text: When Peter Parker enters, create a 2/1 green Spider creature token with reach. {1}{G}{W}{U}: Transform Peter Parker. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Constrictai Brute
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Hypnobrai Dazer
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creaure an opponent controls. {U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Chen, Tournament Master
card.text: Menace, skulk Whenever a creature you control enters, if you didn't cast it, you may have it fight target creature you don't control. {t}: Create a 2/1 black Snake Warrior creature token.

card.name: The Golden Ninja, Destined Hero
card.text: Spinjutsu {w}{u}{b}{r}{g} ({w}{u}{b}{r}{g}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped, and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) Whenever a creature you control attacks and isn't blocked, add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to activate an ability of a card in your hand or a permanent you control.

card.name: Fallen Shinobi
card.text: Ninjutsu {2}{U}{B} ({2}{U}{B}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top two cards of their library. Until end of turn, you may play those cards without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Lloyd, the Green Ninja
card.text: Spinjutsu {3}{g} ({3}{g}: If this card is in your hand or the command zone, return an unblocked attacker you control to hand and put this card onto the battlefield transformed, tapped and attacking. Otherwise, transform it.) {t}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Flame, Guardian of the Inferno
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) Flying, haste

card.name: Topplegeist
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. Delirium — At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, tap target creature that player controls.

card.name: The Destiny's Bounty
card.text: Flying Other unblocked creatures you control get +2/+0. {t}: Add one mana of any color. Crew 3

card.name: Incubator
card.text: {2}: Transform this artifact.

card.name: Pythor, Resurrected Schemer
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each and choose one with power less than Pythor's. You gain control of it until the beginning of your next end step. {t}: Goad target creature.

card.name: Cole, Master of Earth
card.text: Whenever Cole deals combat damage to a player, target creature they control gets -1/-1 for each land you control. {1}{b}: Cole gets +2/+2 and gains indestructible until end of turn. At the beginning of the next upkeep, return Cole to its owner's hand.

card.name: Nya, Cunning Blacksmith
card.text: {X}, {t}: Create an X/X colorless Vehicle artifact token named Skydive Ride with flying, crew 1, and "Whenever this Vehicle attacks and isn't blocked, target creature that crewed it this turn is attacking the same player." (That creature becomes an unblocked attacker.)

card.name: Nya, Master of Water
card.text: Whenever Nya deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you or that player controls. {1}{u}: Return target artifact or creature to its owner's hand. At the beginning of the next upkeep, return Nya to its owner's hand.

card.name: Sensei Wu, Ancient Tutor
card.text: Vigilance, hexproof, skulk {5}: Transform any number of target permanents you control. Partner—Sons of the First

card.name: The Shurikens of Ice
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each snow permanent on the battlefield and has protection from snow. Whenever equipped creature attacks, put an ice counter on target permanent. Permanents with ice counters on them are snow. Equip {1}
